appliedUpdates.description: Updated miri-compatibility.md to reflect post-feature state: 555/580 tests pass (was 330/348), 25 documented ignores, scheduler_state optimized to ~10s (was ~1400s)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to kernel-auditor skill's Test Architecture section: 'When using #[path] to include kernel modules, each must be a top-level mod in a separate integration test file — #[path] does not compose with inline mod blocks. Tests needing kernel includes should be separate files (e.g., adversarial_buddy.rs, adversarial_slab.rs).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature adversarial-stress-tests worker had to split tests into 4 separate files because #[path] includes don't work inside nested mod blocks. Worker documented this in skillFeedback. Reviewer confirmed this is a valid improvement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to kernel-auditor skill's Miri section: 'cargo +nightly miri test exits on first UB per test binary. Run per-file (--test <name>) for complete results across the full suite.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature miri-ub-detection worker ran Miri per-file (25 separate runs) to get complete results. Worker documented this in skillFeedback. Reviewer confirmed value.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a verification-only fast path to kernel-auditor skill for features that make no code changes (e.g., full-regression-run). Current Steps 2-6 (file audit, TDD, fix) are unnecessarily heavyweight for verification-only features. A note like 'If the feature description says NO CODE CHANGES, skip Steps 2-6 and proceed directly to verification commands' would suffice.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature full-regression-run worker followed the full audit procedure despite making no code changes. Worker noted this mismatch in skillFeedback. Reviewer confirmed the overhead.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature description stress-test timeout (30s) is stale vs services.yaml (45s)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a feature description issue, not a shared state issue. The services.yaml already has the correct value (45s). No update needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: grep exit code 1 convention for #[allow] check could be documented in AGENTS.md
rejectedObservations.reason: Too niche to add to AGENTS.md — this only applies to one specific verification step. The handoff already documents the explanation clearly for future reference.
